title: hartogia puberula
intro: Hartogia puberula is a species of flowering plant in the family Achariaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The herbal preparations of Hartogia puberula are typically used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, often in the form of infusions or decoctions.
